name: Musical Keyboard
motive: Offline app that plays selected instrument notes for every keyboard/touch key press.
priority_reason: Fast to polish and useful as a low-risk audio/UI project.
next_build: Add record/replay, MIDI export, WAV export, sustain, octave controls, local eval smoke tests, Mermaid docs, better samples, and optional piezo/pressure-sensor experiments.
integration_role: Kattappa AI OS can open it, change instruments, record, and suggest music ideas.
